title: Algorithms
text: Home * Programming * Algorithms Muḥammad ibn Mūsā al-Khwārizmī [1] Algorithms , in mathematics and computer science, methods for solving a problem expressed as a finite sequence of instructions. The term “algorithm” is derived from the name of Muḥammad ibn Mūsā al-Khwārizmī (born approximately 780 in Khwarezm , died between 835 and 850), the Persian mathematician , astronomer , geographer , and scholar in the House of Wisdom in Baghdad , from the Khorasan province of present-day Uzbekistan [2] .
